_comment: Copy this file, rename it (e.g. user_creation.json), fill in your paths, then run: python3 scripts/zmanda_assemble.py user_creation.json
_outro_comment: Defaults to the Zmanda brand outro. Override only if needed.
_background_comment: Defaults to the plain Zmanda gradient (bg-31). Use bg-30 (Z PRO logo centered) for title-only screens.
_bgm_comment: BGM level in decibels. -35 is very subtle, -30 is slightly more present. Keep between -40 and -28.
_recording_placement_comment: rec_w scales the recording to this width (pixels). rec_x/rec_y position it on the 1920x1080 canvas.
_shadow_comment: Drop shadow under the recording window. opacity 0-1, blur in pixels, dx/dy = offset direction.
_cuts_comment: Segments to REMOVE from the recording (in seconds). These are cut out and the remaining footage is joined.
_speed_ramps_comment: Segments to speed up (not cut). speed=2.0 plays at 2x, speed=3.0 at 3x.
_blurs_comment: Regions to blur (e.g. passwords, emails). coordinate_space: 'output' = 1920x1080 frame coords. 'recording' = original recording coords (auto-scaled).
